verified.notes: Program eligibility tied to full Medicaid ABD criteria (no specific income/assets stated for Community Benefit); age from senior pathway. Official site lacks detailed thresholds.

programs.notes: Program eligibility tied to full Medicaid ABD criteria (no specific income/assets stated for Community Benefit); age from senior pathway. Official site lacks detailed thresholds.

programs.programName: Program of All-Inclusive Care for the Elderly (PACE)

verified.notes: No income or asset limits found in sources; PACE eligibility based on nursing facility level of care and community living ability, not financial tests. Official NM state page at https://www.hca.nm.gov/lookingforinformation/pace/ lacks details.

programs.notes: No income or asset limits found in sources; PACE eligibility based on nursing facility level of care and community living ability, not financial tests. Official NM state page at https://www.hca.nm.gov/lookingforinformation/pace/ lacks details.

verified.notes: Program is Medicaid-based; eligibility follows general Medicaid financial rules (income up to ~138% FPL, no age minimum for adults, no countable asset test), but no senior-specific thresholds or exact 2026 figures found in official sources

programs.notes: Program is Medicaid-based; eligibility follows general Medicaid financial rules (income up to ~138% FPL, no age minimum for adults, no countable asset test), but no senior-specific thresholds or exact 2026 figures found in official sources

programs.programName: New Mexico Senior Farmers' Market Nutrition Program (SFMNP)

verified.notes: Age is 60 for non-Native Americans, 55 for Native Americans; no specific monthly income limits published (185% FPL referenced but no USD figures found); no assets test
